description: A real NIST Special Publication PDF titled 'NIST_SP_800-53_Security_Controls.pdf' has been saved to ~/Documents/. Using the OpenKM document management interface in the browser, upload this document to the 'Compliance' folder in the OpenKM repository. After uploading, add the following keywords to the document: 'security', 'controls', 'nist', 'compliance', 'federal'. The document should be visible in the Compliance folder with all five keywords attached.
